query:
_index=sec_record*
| lookup latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code from geo://location on ip = dstDevice_ip
| count by latitude, longitude, country_code, country_name, region, city, postal_code
| sort _count

sources.dashboardName: Cloud SIEM - Record Analysis - Record Overview
sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides an overview of CSE Records by source, destination, volume and breakdown vendor and product.
